calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-12-2008 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-12-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Deborah Schweizer, Clerk Maria Olopernes-Pena, Not Reported. (218/206)

Appearances:
Plaintiff See Boom Hom is present.
Edward Mack Liu appearing for the plaintiff.

Defendant Gene Garrote is present.
Katie Spielman representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a sign agreement, which was not filed.

This case settled, the trial date of March 17, 2008 is vacated.
